Cascoon

#0267 Beautifly #0269 Dustox
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Cascoon is a Bug type Pokémon introduced in Generation 3.

Cascoon

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0268
Type Bug
Species Cocoon Pokémon
Height 0.7 m (2′04″)
Weight 11.5 kg (25.4 lbs)
Abilities 1. Shed Skin
Local № 0017 (Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald)
0051 (Diamond/Pearl)
0051 (Platinum)
0017 (Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire)
0051 (Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl)
0021 (Legends: Arceus)

Training

EV yield 2 Defense
Catch rate 120 (15.7% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 72
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Bug
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 15 (3,599–3,855 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Cascoon changes

  • In Generations 5-6, Cascoon has a base experience yield of 41.
  • In Generations 3-7, Cascoon has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Ruby CASCOON makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This POKéMON prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.
Sapphire If it is attacked, CASCOON remains motionless however badly it may be hurt. It does so because if it were to move, its body would be weak upon evolution. This POKéMON will also not forget the pain it endured.
FireRed
LeafGreen		 Its body, which is made of soft silk, hardens over time. When cracks appear, evolution is near.
Emerald To avoid detection by its enemies, it hides motionlessly beneath large leaves and in the gaps of branches. It also attaches dead leaves to its body for camouflage.
Diamond It is hot inside its cocoon. All the cells in its body create the energy for it to evolve.
Pearl Encased within its tough cocoon, it endures attacks. It never forgets the appearance of its foes.
Platinum It never forgets any attack it endured while in the cocoon. After evolution, it seeks payback.
HeartGold
SoulSilver		 It endures attacks with patience, because the more pain before evolution, the sturdier it becomes.
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 It never forgets any attack it endured while in the cocoon. After evolution, it seeks payback.
X Its body, which is made of soft silk, hardens over time. When cracks appear, evolution is near.
Y It never forgets any attack it endured while in the cocoon. After evolution, it seeks payback.
Omega Ruby Cascoon makes its protective cocoon by wrapping its body entirely with a fine silk from its mouth. Once the silk goes around its body, it hardens. This Pokémon prepares for its evolution inside the cocoon.
Alpha Sapphire If it is attacked, Cascoon remains motionless however badly it may be hurt. It does so because if it were to move, its body would be weak upon evolution. This Pokémon will also not forget the pain it endured.
Brilliant Diamond It is hot inside its cocoon. All the cells in its body create the energy for it to evolve.
Shining Pearl Encased within its tough cocoon, it endures attacks. It never forgets the appearance of its foes.
Legends: Arceus The silk coating its body is thin but sufficiently strong. Cascoon’s silk has a luster and texture superior to that of Silcoon’s, and clothes made using Cascoon silk are regarded as top-notch.

Moves learnt by level up

Cascoon does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Cascoon cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Answers to Cascoon questions

  • What does "Personality value mod 10 ≥ 5" mean when trying to evolve wurmple?
  • Is there any certain personalitys that make Wurmple evolve?
  • How viable are Mecha Tyranitar and UFO Cascoon in Metronome Battles?

cask
hard container
cocoon
a pupal casing made by some insects
